TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Aziz_Ansari, title = Aziz_Ansari, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aziz_Ansari} }

S.FORM: == Aziz Ansari == kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 2, Aziz Ansari, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Aziz Ansari htagan beh sa ngkalolayco klunpiya. magal cingay ru blaq na biru. hiya ga mhtuw telibis hmyapas na mtzyaw. mrkays beh Bennettsville, South Carolina. pcyogun yaya nya ga pkita nbu sinsiy,yaba(Shoukath) nya ga semong kenkyu hbun ru gyus. srangi' 2014 kawas i Aziz Ansari ru McBroom. hopa kawas Ansari ga musa maki beh Muslim qasa. hga Ansari ga balq balay srangi,mhtuw telibi msqun mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

== Aziz Ansari == kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 2, Aziz Ansari, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Aziz Ansari htagan beh sa ngkalolayco klunpiya. magal cingay ru blaq na biru. hiya ga mhtuw telibis hmyapas na mtzyaw. mrkays beh Bennettsville, South Carolina. pcyogun yaya nya ga pkita nbu sinsiy,yaba(Shoukath) nya ga semong kenkyu hbun ru gyus. srangi' 2014 kawas i Aziz Ansari ru McBroom. hopa kawas Ansari ga musa maki beh Muslim qasa. hga Ansari ga balq balay srangi,mhtuw telibi msqun mtzyaw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == aziz ans~…ēari == kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, aziz ans~…ēari, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. qjanux na s~…ēraral aziz ans~…ēari ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa Ňčkalolaj ¶~ ®o klunpija. ma…£al ¶~ ®iŇčaj ru ő≤laq na ő≤iru. ńßija …£a mńßtuw teliő≤is~…ē ńßmjapas~…ē na mtzjaw. mrkajs~…ē ő≤eńß ő≤ennetts~…ē*ille, s~…ēoutńß ¶~ ®arolina. p ¶~ ®jo…£un jaja nja …£a pkita nő≤u s~…ēins~…ēij,jaő≤a(s~…ēńßoukatńß) nja …£a s~…ēemoŇč kenkju ńßő≤un ru …£jus~…ē. s~…ēraŇči Ē **** kawas~…ē i aziz ans~…ēari ru m ¶~ ®ő≤room. ńßopa kawas~…ē ans~…ēari …£a mus~…ēa maki ő≤eńß mus~…ēlim qas~…ēa. ńß…£a ans~…ēari …£a ő≤alq ő≤alaj s~…ēraŇči,mńßtuw teliő≤i ms~…ēqun mtzjaw. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
